metadata.description: Portable Claude Code plugin marketplace for the universal-plugins-for-ai-agents repository.

plugins.name: atlassian
plugins.description: Official Atlassian Rovo MCP plugin for Jira, Confluence, and Compass workflows through Atlassian's hosted remote MCP service.

plugins.name: chrome-devtools
plugins.description: Portable Chrome DevTools MCP plugin for Claude, Codex, Gemini, OpenCode, and Cursor. Launch the official Chrome DevTools MCP server so agents can inspect pages, automate flows, analyze performance, and debug browser state.

plugins.name: cloudflare
plugins.description: Official Cloudflare API MCP plugin for token-efficient access to the Cloudflare API through Cloudflare's hosted Code Mode server.

plugins.name: cloudflare-bindings
plugins.description: Official Cloudflare Workers Bindings MCP integration for storage, AI, and compute primitives.

plugins.name: cloudflare-docs
plugins.description: Official Cloudflare hosted MCP plugin for up-to-date Cloudflare documentation and reference lookups through Cloudflare's remote documentation server.

plugins.name: cloudflare-observability
plugins.description: Official Cloudflare hosted MCP plugin for logs, analytics, and production debugging through Cloudflare's remote observability server.

plugins.name: cloudflare-radar
plugins.description: Official Cloudflare Radar MCP plugin for internet telemetry, traffic trends, and network intelligence through Cloudflare's hosted Radar server.

plugins.name: context7
plugins.description: Portable Context7 MCP plugin for Claude, Codex, Gemini, OpenCode, and Cursor. Pull up-to-date, version-specific documentation and code examples directly from source repositories into agent context.

plugins.name: docker-hub
plugins.description: Official Docker Hub MCP plugin for repository, image, and Docker Hub workflows through Docker's containerized stdio server.

plugins.name: figma
plugins.description: Official Figma MCP plugin for design context, code-to-design workflows, and authenticated access to Figma Design, Make, and FigJam through Figma's remote MCP service.

plugins.name: firebase
plugins.description: Google Firebase MCP integration. Manage Firestore databases, authentication, cloud functions, hosting, and storage. Build and manage your Firebase backend directly from your development workflow.

plugins.name: github
plugins.description: Official GitHub MCP plugin for repository management. Create issues, manage pull requests, review code, search repositories, and interact with GitHub's full API directly from Claude Code.

plugins.name: gitlab
plugins.description: Portable GitLab MCP plugin for Claude, Codex, Gemini, OpenCode, and Cursor. Connect agents to GitLab so they can inspect projects, issues, merge requests, and related DevOps workflows through the official GitLab MCP server over HTTP.

plugins.name: gmail
plugins.description: Anthropic-hosted Gmail connector plugin for Claude. Search mail, read threads, inspect metadata, and draft Gmail messages through Claude's hosted MCP service.

plugins.name: google-calendar
plugins.description: Anthropic-hosted Google Calendar connector plugin for Claude. Read calendars, manage events, and find availability through Claude's hosted MCP service.

plugins.name: greptile
plugins.description: Official Greptile MCP integration for repository search and code intelligence tooling.

plugins.name: heroku
plugins.description: Official Heroku hosted MCP plugin for apps, add-ons, logs, Postgres, and operational workflows through Heroku's remote MCP service.

plugins.name: hubspot-crm
plugins.description: Official HubSpot remote MCP integration for beta, read-only CRM object access through HubSpot's hosted MCP server.

plugins.name: hubspot-developer
plugins.description: Local HubSpot Developer MCP integration for project scaffolding, CMS, builds, logs, and app workflows via the HubSpot CLI.

plugins.name: linear
plugins.description: Official Linear MCP integration for workspace management, issues, and project workflows.

plugins.name: microsoft365
plugins.description: Anthropic-hosted Microsoft 365 connector plugin for Claude. Search SharePoint and OneDrive, analyze Outlook email and calendar data, and pull Teams chat context through Claude's hosted MCP service.

plugins.name: neon
plugins.description: Official Neon hosted MCP plugin for database, branch, and project workflows through Neon's remote MCP server.

plugins.name: notion
plugins.description: Official Notion hosted MCP plugin for user-authorized workspace access. Search pages, read docs, edit content, and work with Notion knowledge directly from AI agents.

plugins.name: sentry
plugins.description: Official Sentry hosted MCP plugin for human-in-the-loop debugging, issue triage, and incident workflows through Sentry's remote MCP service.

plugins.name: slack
plugins.description: Official Slack hosted MCP plugin for Slack search, messaging, canvases, and user context through Slack's remote MCP service.

plugins.name: statsig
plugins.description: Official Statsig MCP plugin for experiments, feature flags, configs, metrics, and console workflows through Statsig's hosted MCP service.

plugins.name: stripe
plugins.description: Official Stripe hosted MCP plugin for payments, billing, customer, and documentation workflows through Stripe's remote MCP service.

plugins.name: supabase
plugins.description: Official Supabase MCP integration for development and database operations from agent workflows.

plugins.name: vercel
plugins.description: Official Vercel hosted MCP plugin for project, deployment, log, and documentation workflows through Vercel's remote MCP service.
